pages.text: Silent Gear grades are the real quality chase. Run important ingots, gems, and special materials through the Material Grader. Better grades improve the material before it ever becomes a part.
The intended high-end loop is: grade the base materials, alloy them in the alloy forge, grade the resulting alloy, then craft the part. For cascade alloys, repeat that loop at each step.

Do not waste perfect-grade materials on throwaway tools. Save the best rolls for cascade alloys, carbide tips, boss weapons, magic coatings, and armor linings that you intend to socket with Apotheosis gems.
